name: Local-First Execution
description: Does the system function without external API calls or cloud dependencies?

name: Hardware Ownership
description: Can the system run on consumer-grade high-end hardware (RTX 3090/4090) owned by the user?

name: Stealth Agency
description: Does the agent use anti-capture technologies to avoid detection and censorship?

name: Trust Boundaries
description: Does the architecture enforce strict isolation between sensitive user data and LLM reasoning layers?

name: Empirical Prediction Markets
description: Does the system value decentralized betting/skin-in-the-game (Polymarket) over centralized narratives?

name: Self-Managed I/O
description: Is the control interface self-hosted and private?

name: Persistent Autonomy
description: Can the agent operate 24/7 with its own budget and permissions without human hand-holding?

name: On-Chain Verifiability
description: Is the state or inference verifiable on a high-performance decentralized network (Solana)?
